title: Neon Craft Ultimate
body:
![Neon Craft Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec75841ae8325341f4885142bed185382530ea52.png) ___ This mod adds colorful neon lights → 40 characters available in 8 colors.
Each neon light emits a light level of 15. ___ ![Neon Lights Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c70809120abec891e5a3d5b00df5bd388a63a04f.png) ___ ![Getting Started Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ed8b04a5e35d34f214269634ee51d6d0297207b.png) ___ To unlock all the neon lights recipes you need to craft a "Neon Cell".
You can also unlock recipes by crafting a "Glass Stick". ___ ![Unlock Recipes Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82a5d53f665fac8df8c8e8381132fb4ecf7769f1.png) ___ Any neon light can be recolored using dyes or recolor tools. ___ ![Recolor Tools Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f437eeb47c1758763d592c9df92ee7cb653ca20.png) ___ ![F.A.Q. Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2704d1a1f2ed0d6fe1b4a25841a04cf3ccc8c126.png) ___ Q: Any plans to update for 1.x version?
A: Only 1.19+ versions, unless an older version is heavily requested. ___ Q: Can I use this mod in my modpack?
A: Yes, if you credit the author clearly. ___ ![Support Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c4c9b03d637d56d371762dfec5d374febee62ff.png) ___ You can donate here:
[https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/polyvalord](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/polyvalord) ___ You can help improving the mod by joining the Discord to suggest ideas or give feedback:
[https://discord.gg/XjZ9D9Yu7V](https://discord.gg/XjZ9D9Yu7V) ___
